title: Only set default network sysctls if not rootless
body:
Some older kernels do not expose all network sysctls to rootless containers.  Just disable them in rootless mode for now.

Fixes #1618

comments.body: Does this need tests?  I'm not at all familiar with the buildah tests so could use some brief guidance if this warrants additional tests.

Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
